title: Consumables Management Lite
description: Item catalog, multi-company stock, purchase and requisition with approval — a compact consumables loop you can rebuild in one prompt.
description_cn: 物品目录、多公司库存、采购与领用审批 —— 一段提示词即可复刻的小型易耗品闭环。
description_ja: 品目カタログ、多社在庫、購買・払出承認 —— ひとつのプロンプトで再現できる小型消耗品ループ。

tags.title: No-code solutions
tags.title_ja: ノーコードソリューション
tags.keywords_ja: ノーコード, ソリューション

tags.title: Internal-Tools
tags.description_ja: 内部ツールに関する説明はここに記載されます。
tags.keywords_ja: 内部, ツール, 管理

author: NocoBase Team
prompt:
You are connected to a NocoBase instance with data-modeling and UI-building tools.

Build a lightweight consumables management module:

1. Collections:
   - items: name, code (unique), category (select: office/tool/safety), unit, reference_price (number, 2 decimals)
   - stocks: item (m2o -> items), company (input), quantity (integer), safe_quantity (integer)
   - purchase_requests: request_no, item (m2o), quantity, estimated_price, status (select: drafted/submitted/approved/rejected), requested_by
   - requisitions: request_no, item (m2o), quantity, status (same enum), requested_by
2. Pages: one management page per collection (table + addNew/edit/view), group them under a "Consumables" menu group.
3. Workflow: when a purchase_request is approved, increase the matching stocks.quantity; when a requisition is approved, decrease it.
4. Required fields: items.name, items.code, all quantity fields.

Use English for all seed data. Create 5 sample items and 2 sample stocks per item.
